name: launch-asset-packager
description: Use when the user asks to "package the launch assets", "build a press kit", or "prep the store listing and go-live checklist"; produces a tier-scoped launch asset manifest with production status — a press kit spec (factsheet, description, history, features, videos, images, logo and icon, awards, contact), demo script and screenshot specs, a launch FAQ, dual-store listing metadata drafts against the official character budgets (per App Store Connect / Play Console documentation), and a technical g
author: aaron-he-zhu
